meta.title: Multi-horizon regime machine
meta.subtitle: State-machine covered-call overwrite vs fair buy-and-hold
meta.rule: Classify each decision day into crisis / runner / pullback / mkt_weak / name_weak / calm from name mom21+63, SPY mom63, and VIX. Each state maps to shared coverage, OTM band, and equity deploy fraction.

protocol: Score pre-declared multi-horizon machines and alternate engines on IS only (core 16).
One OOS pass and expanded stress. No threshold re-pick.
